title: X User Claims to Have Found a Bitcoin Wallet with 200 BTC
summary: A user on X (formerly Twitter) claims to have discovered a Bitcoin wallet containing 200 BTC. The wallet's current value is approximately $12.6 million at current exchange rates.
body:
A user on X, known as @davewardonline, has posted a claim that they have found a Bitcoin wallet containing 200 BTC. The wallet, which has been dormant for several years, reportedly holds a significant amount of the cryptocurrency.

The user did not provide specific details about how the wallet was discovered or its origin. However, they mentioned that the wallet's current value is approximately $12.6 million, based on the current exchange rate of Bitcoin. The user also hinted at the possibility of selling the Bitcoin but did not provide any further information on the process or timeline.

This discovery, if verified, could have significant implications for the Bitcoin market. The movement of such a large amount of Bitcoin could potentially impact market prices and liquidity. It also raises questions about the security and management of dormant wallets, which are often targeted by hackers and scammers.

For those interested in following this story, it is important to watch for any official verification of the wallet's contents and the user's intentions. The cryptocurrency community will likely be closely monitoring any developments, as the sale or transfer of such a large amount of Bitcoin could have a notable impact on the market. Read more → https://x.com/davewardonline/status/2057099259338535211
twitterThread: A user on X claims to have found a Bitcoin wallet with 200 BTC, worth ~$12.6M. The wallet has been dormant for years.
The user, @davewardonline, didn't reveal how they found the wallet but hinted at selling the Bitcoin. No details on the process yet.

If verified, this could impact Bitcoin prices. Watch for official confirmation and market reactions. Read more → https://cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-05-20-x-user-claims-to-have-found-a-bitcoin-wallet-with-200-btc
standaloneTweet: A Bitcoin wallet with 200 BTC (~$12.6M) has been discovered, claims a user on X. If true, this could shake up the market.
